subject: A large orangutan rearing up on its hind legs in a ruined stone courtyard, both arms raised, smashing golden thopter-drone constructs, with more broken drones scattered on the ground
description: A powerful orangutan stands upright with both arms raised overhead, gripping and smashing two golden mechanical thopter constructs — small flying drones with jewel-like power sources visible in their broken casings. The orangutan's mouth is open in a roar, face expressing wild anger or excitement. Several more broken and deactivated thopters litter the overgrown stone-rubble ground around it. The setting is a ruined stone courtyard with vine-draped walls, giving a naturalistic encroachment-on-civilization feel. The palette is warm brown, tan, grey stone, and touches of gold from the destroyed constructs.
foreground: rearing orangutan smashing thopter drones with both hands
background: ruined stone courtyard, vine-covered walls, scattered broken thopters
emotion: wild exhilaration or rage — open-mouthed roar, arms raised triumphantly
